rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN E LAWRENCE VS. SEAN MCKEAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attornes Fees And Judgement Against Pltf Stephen E. Lawrence; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 10, 2008, line 2, DEFENDANTS SEAN MCKEAN AND SHAWN MCILVENNA'S Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Judgement Against Plaintiff Stephen E. Lawrence. OPPOSITION STRICKEN, ATTORNEY NOT COUNSEL OF RECORD. MATTER CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 2, 2008, PLAINTIFF TO FILE OPPOSITION BY NOVEMBER 26, 2008. =(302/PHA/VC)
